title: DIMCP EP_36 tacos for Catie
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_36 tacos for Catie.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Say it out. We're taking some Taco Bell to a young woman named KDB.
[00:00:07.48] Can't be KDB. Check it out. She lives like four blocks away from the Taco Bell.
[00:00:13.08] We just drove through to get her some fourth meal or whatever.
[00:00:18.64] LBR let's be real KDB. How lazy can you be?
[00:00:23.04] Open your door. You could have just walked.
[00:00:25.12] We got a road. Why do we got a? Are you standing?
[00:00:29.28] Now I'll go take the delivery with you.
[00:00:31.68] I'm drink carrier.
[00:00:34.44] Roof. And check it out.
[00:00:37.92] I got a drink to take to carry to KDB right now.
[00:00:42.48] Open your door.
[00:00:43.68] Wait tell me to open my door.
[00:00:45.28] Look at Lockham.
[00:00:47.28] We got to open your doors to lock them.
[00:00:49.36] Well now you're going to have to unlock it.
[00:00:51.92] I'm just trying to get this delivery on the moon.
[00:00:54.40] All right I forgot.
[00:00:56.56] Tracy fell on the floor earlier but she's doing good.
[00:00:59.52] Tracy.
